**Which prompt?**
<!-- e.g., pre-filing/claims-drafting -->

**What's the issue with the current prompt?**
<!-- Describe what the prompt gets wrong or could do better -->

**Suggested change**
<!-- Describe your proposed improvement -->

**Example output (before and after)**
<!-- If possible, show the current output vs. what you'd expect -->

**Model used**
<!-- Which LLM did you test with? -->
